description: vibe coding represents an exciting evolution in software development, offering speed and a novel creative process. Its addictive nature stems from powerful psychological drivers: the thrill of instant creation, the deep immersion of flow states, and the tantalising unpredictability of AI collaboration. As this approach matures, developers will need to harness its compelling power responsibly, enjoying the exhilarating ride without losing sight of the foundational skills and critical thinking that underpin great software. The siren song of the AI co-pilot is strong; learning to sail with it, rather than be capsized by its charm, will be key.
name: em
